name: Maryland Action (via VanHollen.org)
subject: The Fight To Save Health Care -- Join us Sunday at Bowie State!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Yesterday -- in my first speech on the Senate floor -- I pledged to fight every day to defeat their reckless plan. | Friend,

The fight to save health care for millions of Americans and preserve the benefits of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) has begun.

This Sunday, January 15th, is a NATIONAL DAY OF ACTION and people all over the country will be rallying to save health care. Here in Maryland we will be rallying at Bowie State University in Bowie, Maryland to show our commitment to protecting health care and fighting to save the ACA.

**[We need you to join us! Click here to RSVP and get further details.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5f/70cdc2ba/4738571b/3979be9/955623376/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+need+you+to+join+us+Click+here+to+RSV&utm_campaign=em010916_MD&source=em010916_MD")**

This is our opportunity to show Congressional Republicans we will stand up against their reckless plan to repeal healthcare and run. The fight will be long, but this is the first step. We want our message heard loud and clear!

**[Click the link below for details and RSVP so that Chris will know you can join this Day of Action!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5f/70cdc2ba/4738571b/3979be6/955623376/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+the+link+below+for+details+and+RSV&utm_campaign=em010916_MD&source=em010916_MD")** [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5f/70cdc2ba/4738571b/3979be7/955623376/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em010916_MD&source=em010916_MD") Thanks for being part of the fight,

Team Van Hollen

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5f/70cdc2ba/4738571b/3979be4/955623376/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em010916_MD&source=em010916_MD")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5f/70cdc2ba/4738571b/3979be5/955623376/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em010916_MD&source=em010916_MD") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Tyler Foote
subject: Moving up
body:
---
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | Hey Peter,

Have you seen the newest policy victories achieved by AFP activists?

* Helped to defeat the $500 million Fairfax Meals Tax
* Kept over $60 million in economic activity from legalizing Short-Term rentals like Airbnb
* Stopped $5 million of property tax increases in Spotsylvania
* Mobilized activists against the VA Beach Light Rail

We have built extraordinary momentum with local policy wins. _Your support and enthusiasm can help ensure the grassroots is heard this legislative session._

Americans for Prosperity's [2017 Lobby Day ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=ca3f2091923746b429f876bf8ebd8b265ef63de3a87f5da42e66de8f6880f4dfa217a06e90599438)comes again to the General Assembly to fight for economic freedom. You'll have the chance to talk with Virginia legislators about our top policy priorities.

Our Lobby Day agenda will promote policies that:

1) Allow Virginians to Keep More of Their Hard-Earned Money
2) Break Down Barriers to Success
3) Let Virginians Decide Whats Best for Virginia

We also have a great lineup of speakers including Ed Gillespie, Congressman Dave Brat, Senator Frank Wagner, Supervisor Corey Stewart, and Denver Riggleman.

**Can I count on you to [join us](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=ca3f2091923746b429f876bf8ebd8b265ef63de3a87f5da42e66de8f6880f4dfa217a06e90599438)**** on Monday, January 16?**

We'll need all hands on deck to pass a pro-freedom policy agenda. We are uniting to build a path to prosperity that will make Virginia more competitive and lead to more opportunities for every citizen.

**_If you support these principles, and want your voice heard in Richmond, then I urge you to join AFP's Lobby Day right away. Sign-up here: [www.VirginiaLobbyDay.com](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=ca3f2091923746b429f876bf8ebd8b265ef63de3a87f5da42e66de8f6880f4dfa217a06e90599438)_**** _. Free transportation and lunch are provided._**

For Freedom,

Tyler Foote
Virginia State Director
Americans for Prosperity

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=ca3f2091923746b4aee94ab3db70ae573d533aca3fd7a978cb89029713bf2c2c939bb9863943bf77)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU)

---

name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name: demand a full review of Trump's nominees
body:
Trump's nominees are on the Hill for confirmation this week.
---
**Republicans want to rush Donald Trump's nominees through the confirmation process before they've been fully vetted by the public and government ethics watchdogs. Add your name and stand with Senate Democrats to demand a full and thorough review of Trump's nominees:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Nominees1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew_v2s1&source=em_20170110_ew_v2s1")**
Friend --

Senate Republicans want to ram Donald Trump's Cabinet nominees through the Senate as fast as they can before the public has time to vet them.

That's not how this process works, and Trump's Cabinet picks are too dangerous to give them the benefit of the doubt. Take for instance Trump's choice to be Secretary of State, Rex Tillerson, whose only foreign policy "credential" seems to be his long-time friendship with Vladimir Putin. And nothing should be easy about making Jeff Sessions, who made his career by turning the courts against civil rights activists and ignoring voter disenfranchisement in black communities in Alabama, as the next Attorney General.

Republicans have scheduled confirmation hearings for Tillerson, Sessions, and several of Trump's other nominees all for this week. By holding all the hearings at once, they hope that they can cram these nominees down our throats before we have time to object. Senate Democrats are going to make sure that doesn't happen -- but they need to know we have their backs.

**Stand with Senate Democrats and demand a full and thorough review of Trump's nominees:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Nominees1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew_v2s1&source=em_20170110_ew_v2s1")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1c5/4067b0a/2343d27ff/7e79b0f4/1439343329/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew_v2s1&source=em_20170110_ew_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1c5/4067b0a/2343d27ff/7e79b0f5/1439343329/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew_v2s1&source=em_20170110_ew_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1c5/4067b0a/2343d27ff/7e79b0f2/1439343329/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew_v2s1&source=em_20170110_ew_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1c5/4067b0a/2343d27ff/7e79b0f3/1439343329/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew_v2s1&source=em_20170110_ew_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

That's not how this process works, and Trump's Cabinet picks are too dangerous to give them the benefit of the doubt. Take for instance Trump's choice to be Secretary of State, Rex Tillerson, whose only foreign policy "credential" seems to be his long-time friendship with Vladimir Putin. And nothing should be easy about making Jeff Sessions, who made his career by turning the courts against civil rights activists and ignoring voter disenfranchisement in black communities in Alabama, as the next Attorney General. name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Bernie needs you to call your senator
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
During his campaign, Trump promised he would make no cuts to Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid. He said it would be unfair to the people who have been paying into those programs for years.
Now Republicans have proposed a budget that would throw 30 million Americans off their health insurance. They want to privatize Medicare, raise prescription costs, and reduce Social Security benefits, which serves as the primary source of income for the majority of seniors.
**Tomorrow Bernie is introducing a budget amendment that would prevent Senate Republicans from breaking Donald Trump's campaign promise to make no cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security. Will you help make sure that enough senators support his amendment so it will be passed?**
[**Call your senators to tell them to support Bernie's amendment to protect health care and Social Security benefits for millions of Americans.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/call-your-senators/?source=em170110 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/call-your-senators/?source=em170110")
The Republicans' proposal to cut spending on Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security is out of touch with what the American people want. Most Americans think that the federal government should be spending _more_ on these programs, not less.
We can't sit back and allow 30 million people to be denied health care and Social Security benefits. Our goal is to expand health care, not cut health insurance for tens of millions of Americans.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/call-your-senators/?source=em170110 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/call-your-senators/?source=em170110")
_PHOTO: C-SPAN. Last week Bernie took to the Senate floor with a gigantic printout of one of Trump's tweets promising not to cut Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid._
Bernie's doing his part to make sure Republicans don't take away health care for millions of Americans - now we have to do ours as well by telling his colleagues in the Senate to vote in support of Bernie's amendment:
[**Call your senators right now to urge them to support Bernie's amendment that would prevent Republicans from making cuts to Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/call-your-senators/?source=em170110 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/call-your-senators/?source=em170110")
Thank you for stepping up to make sure Bernie's amendment is passed.
In solidarity,
Kyle Machado
Our Revolution
**[CALL YOUR SENATORS NOW](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/call-your-senators/?source=em170110 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/call-your-senators/?source=em170110")**
** **

** **
** **
** **

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Democrats.org
subject: CALL NOW: Tell the Senate to oppose Jeff Sessions
body:
When senators hear from their constituents, they listen
---
**Call Senate Republicans and tell them to reject Jeff Sessions' nomination -- it only takes two minutes to have a big impact:

** **[CALL NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1d9/4067b0a/233d52ed7/7e79beb6/3416264227/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "http://my.democrats.org/Call-Congress1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+CALL+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew2_f3&source=em_20170110_ew2_f3")**
If you ask House Republicans why they backed down on their attempt to gut Congressional ethics rules, they'll tell you it was because their offices were flooded by calls from constituents like you telling their representatives that this was unacceptable.

**[Your voice is powerful. And we're counting on you to use it to call Senate Republicans and speak out against the appointment of Jeff Sessions as Attorney General.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1d9/4067b0a/233d52ed7/7e79beb7/3416264227/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "http://my.democrats.org/Call-Congress1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Your+voice+is+powerfulCUSTOMDATASETslugw&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew2_f3&source=em_20170110_ew2_f3")**

Why?

* Because Sessions was deemed too racist to be confirmed as a federal judge in 1986. He's called the Voting Rights Act an "intrusive piece of legislation" and said it was "good news" for the South when key provisions were gutted in 2013 -- and now Trump wants to put him in charge of the Justice Department's Civil Rights Division.
* Because he has been the most vocally anti-immigrant member of the Senate, playing a key role in killing any attempt at comprehensive immigration reform during the Obama administration.
* Because he has an abysmal record on LGBT rights, including voting against federal hate crime legislation and the repeal of "Don't Ask, Don't Tell."
* And because he voted against reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act.

**You have the opportunity today to call Republican senators and let them know why you oppose the appointment of Jeff Sessions. We've created this call tool to make it as easy as possible -- just follow this link, make the call, and then forward it to everyone you know to make their voices heard too:**

**[CALL NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1d9/4067b0a/233d52ed7/7e79beb4/3416264227/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "http://my.democrats.org/Call-Congress1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+CALL+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew2_f3&source=em_20170110_ew2_f3")**
This is an important fight -- and we can't win it without supporters like you making their voices heard.

Thanks for getting involved,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1d9/4067b0a/233d52ed7/7e79beb5/3416264227/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew2_f3&source=em_20170110_ew2_f3"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1d9/4067b0a/233d52ed7/7e79beb2/3416264227/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew2_f3&source=em_20170110_ew2_f3"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1d9/4067b0a/233d52ed7/7e79beb3/3416264227/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew2_f3&source=em_20170110_ew2_f3") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1d9/4067b0a/233d52ed7/7e79beb0/3416264227/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170110_ew2_f3&source=em_20170110_ew2_f3"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Thank you President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Before he gives his final speech tonight, please join me in thanking President Obama for his service. Add your name and thank the president for all he's done. >>> | Friend,

Later today President Obama will give his final Farewell Address in Chicago after eight years of leading our nation with dignity and respect.

From bringing our country back from the worst economic disaster since the Great Depression, to expanding healthcare coverage to millions of Americans, President Obama has moved our country forward during his time in office. I've been proud to work with him.

Before he gives his final speech tonight, please join me in thanking President Obama for his service. **[Add your name and thank the president for all he's done.>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5d/70cdc2ba/4738e978/3979a2e/3166617712/VEsH/ "http://go.democrataction.com/Thanks-JA-CVH?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+and+thank+the+president+fo&utm_campaign=em0111017&source=em0111017")** [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5d/70cdc2ba/4738e978/3979a2f/3166617712/VEsE/ "http://go.democrataction.com/Thanks-JA-CVH?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em0111017&source=em0111017") President Obama has shown us what true leadership looks like -- putting the Constitution, the laws of this land, and the interests of the American people foremost every day. He will be missed. Now its up to us to carry on his legacy.

**[Please take a moment to sign on and thank President Obama. Then, let's commit ourselves to fighting every day to protecting and advancing the progress we have made together over the last eight years.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5d/70cdc2ba/4738e978/3979a2c/3166617712/VEsF/ "http://go.democrataction.com/Thanks-JA-CVH?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+take+a+moment+to+sign+on+and+than&utm_campaign=em0111017&source=em0111017")**

Thank you,

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5d/70cdc2ba/4738e978/3979a2d/3166617712/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em0111017&source=em0111017")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5d/70cdc2ba/4738e978/3979a2a/3166617712/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em0111017&source=em0111017") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: matt@dscc.org
subject: FLASH SALE: Your #ThanksObama tote (today only)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Announcing a one-day FLASH SALE on our final "Thanks Obama" tote bags! Take advantage of this unbeatable deal today and help carry President Obama's legacy forward. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20170110-Matt_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")
---
**_LAST CHANCE: "Thanks Obama" Totes Nearly Sold Out_
[Carry his legacy with you! Get your tote today >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20170110-Matt_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")**
This is it, Friend - President Obama delivers his farewell address tonight.

And while we're sad to see his presidency come to a close, we're also celebrating eight years of incredible progress - tireless leadership that made our country healthier and our planet greener.

| [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20170110-Matt_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")
---
So we've got the perfect way to honor that amazing work and carry his legacy forward: [**A special discount on our "Thanks Obama" tote bag! Pitch in $29 or more today and we'll send you one >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20170110-Matt_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")

As Democrats, we know the President and First Lady made our country a better place these past eight years - from marriage equality and cutting unemployment in half to being role models for us and our families - and now it's our job to protect their legacy for years to come.

You can start today by pitching in $29 or more to support Democrats who will defend and build on our progress. In return, we'll send you one of our FINAL "Thanks Obama" totes!

[**But don 't wait, Friend, only a limited amount of totes remain. Get yours today (we'll cover the shipping!) >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20170110-Matt_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")

Thanks for your support,

Matt Kehres
Digital Director, DSCC

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.
[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170110-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed23/2b07114c/463f6ab0/7368782c/3985771135/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed23/2b07114c/463f6ab0/7368782f/3985771135/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed23/2b07114c/463f6ab0/7368782e/3985771135/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: ACT-NOW (via VanHollen.org)
subject: ICYMI: Join us - The fight to save health care!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Sunday is a National Day of Action to save health care. Join Chris this Sunday to make your voice heard! | Friend, have you heard?

Sunday is a National Day of Action to save health care. Join Chris this Sunday to make your voice heard!

More information is below. **[Please click here to RSVP and get further details.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5b/70cdc2ba/474766a3/3979946/821485865/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+click+here+to+RSVP+and+get+furthe&utm_campaign=em011017_MD&source=em011017_MD")**

_Begin Forwarded Message:_

> Friend,
>
> The fight to save health care for millions of Americans and preserve the benefits of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) has begun.
>
> This Sunday, January 15th, is a NATIONAL DAY OF ACTION and people all over the country will be rallying to save health care. Here in Maryland we will be rallying at Bowie State University in Bowie, Maryland to show our commitment to protecting health care and fighting to save the ACA.
>
> **[We need you to join us! Click here to RSVP and get further details.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5b/70cdc2ba/474766a3/3979947/821485865/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+need+you+to+join+us+Click+here+to+RSV&utm_campaign=em011017_MD&source=em011017_MD")**
>
> This is our opportunity to show Congressional Republicans we will stand up against their reckless plan to repeal healthcare and run. The fight will be long, but this is the first step. We want our message heard loud and clear!
>
> **[Click the link below for details and RSVP so that Chris will know you can join this Day of Action!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5b/70cdc2ba/474766a3/3979944/821485865/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+the+link+below+for+details+and+RSV&utm_campaign=em011017_MD&source=em011017_MD")** [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5b/70cdc2ba/474766a3/3979945/821485865/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/event-join-us-protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em011017_MD&source=em011017_MD") Thanks for being part of the fight,
>
> Team Van Hollen
>
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5b/70cdc2ba/474766a3/3979942/821485865/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em011017_MD&source=em011017_MD")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b5b/70cdc2ba/474766a3/3979943/821485865/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em011017_MD&source=em011017_MD") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
